greeting: Salaan, sidee kuu caawin karaa maanta?
disclaimer: Macluumaadkan waxay u tahay hanuunin keliya. Had iyo jeer la tasho farmashiistaha ama dhakhtarkaaga.
prescription_prompt: Fadlan sawir qaar ama qor faahfaahinta daawahaaga.
error_generic: Wax khalad ah ayaa dhacay. Ku celi ama wac NHS 111.
triage_emergency: U wac 999 deg deg ah xaaladaha halis ah ee nolosha.
triage_urgent: Fadlan la xiriir NHS 111 ama booqo Xarunta Daawaynta Deg Degga ee ugu dhow.
triage_routine: Buuxi ballan caadi ah oo la xiriira dhakhtarkaaga guud.
triage_self_care: Tani waxa laga yaabaa in guriga lagu maareeyo. Haddi calaamadaha ay sii daraan la tasho farmashiiste.
